hook.summary: Fast-paced first-person shooter gameplay featuring a lava-themed weapon and immediate level-up feedback.
hook.visual_action: The player fires a glowing lava gun at an opponent in a blocky, yellow-and-black arena.

scene_flow: Initial engagement with an enemy using a high-impact lava weapon.
Visual confirmation of a level-up and kill assist notification.
Player maneuvers through a block-based arena while tracking new targets.
Combat continues with health regeneration effects visible on screen.
audience_proxy: Young competitive gamers interested in Roblox-style first-person shooters.
